query:
-- EAST region games (201-208): Duke, Ohio St, Louisville, Michigan St + St. John's, Kansas, UCLA, UConn
-- These are on March 19
UPDATE games SET gameDate = '2026-03-19'
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM'
AND gameDate = '2026-03-18'
AND id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT id FROM games
    WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-18'
    AND (
      homeTeam IN ('duke', 'ohio_st', 'louisville', 'michigan_st', 'st_johns', 'kansas', 'ucla', 'connecticut',
                   'vanderbilt', 'nebraska', 'north_carolina', 'illinois', 'st_marys', 'houston', 'clemson')
      OR awayTeam IN ('siena', 'tcu', 'south_florida', 'n_dakota_st', 'n_iowa', 'california_baptist', 'c_florida', 'furman',
                      'mcneese_st', 'troy', 'va_commonwealth', 'pennsylvania', 'texas_a_and_m', 'idaho', 'iowa')
    )
  ) AS sub
);
command:

                   'vanderbilt', 'nebraska', 'north_carolina', 'illinois', 'st_marys', 'houston', 'clemson')
      OR awayTeam IN ('siena', 'tcu', 'south_florida', 'n_dakota_st', 'n_iowa', 'california_baptist', 'c_florida', 'furman',
                      'mcneese_st', 'troy', 'va_commonwealth', 'pennsylvania', 'texas_a_and_m', 'idaho', 'iowa')
    )
